features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast cleric spells. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.description: Choose a domain related to your deity. Your choice grants you domain spells and other features at levels 1, 2, 6, 8, and 17.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring the undead. Each undead within 30 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw.

features.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1/2)
features.description: When an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead, the creature is instantly destroyed if its CR is 1/2 or lower.

features.name: Channel Divinity: 2 Uses
features.description: You can use Channel Divinity twice between rests.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: You can call on your deity to intervene on your behalf. Roll d100; if you roll equal to or lower than your cleric level, your deity intervenes.

features.name: Channel Divinity: 3 Uses
features.description: You can use Channel Divinity three times between rests.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a fighting style specialty: Archery (+2 ranged attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC in armor), Dueling (+2 damage with one-handed weapon), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s and 2s on damage with two-handed weapons), Protection (impose disadvantage on attacks against adjacent allies), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to off-hand attacks).

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: As a bonus action, regain 1d10 + your fighter level HP. You can use this feature once per short or long rest.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: On your turn, you can take one additional action. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.description: Choose an archetype that reflects your style and technique (Champion, Battle Master, or Eldritch Knight).

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice whenever you take the Attack action.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: You can reroll a saving throw that you fail. You must use the new roll. You can use this feature once between long rests.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: Choose two of your skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check using those skills.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Once per turn, deal extra damage to one creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon if you have advantage or an ally is adjacent to the target. The extra damage increases as you gain levels.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: Secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code. Takes 4 times longer to convey a message in cant than normal speech.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: As a bonus action, Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose an archetype that reflects your character's focus (Thief, Assassin, or Arcane Trickster).

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack, use your reaction to halve the attack's damage.

features.name: Evasion
features.description: When subjected to an effect that allows a DEX saving throw for half damage, take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast wizard spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. Your spellbook contains six 1st-level wizard spells.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day after a short rest, recover spell slots whose combined level is no more than half your wizard level (rounded up). Cannot recover slots of 6th level or higher.

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.description: Choose an arcane tradition (School of Evocation, School of Abjuration, etc.).

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level spell. You can cast each at its lowest level without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells. You always have them prepared and can cast each once without expending a spell slot.
